content.en:
Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian came out of the middle transfer hall and sensed a large number of supreme Dao realms, the lowest cultivation level was the fourfold Dao realm, many of them were fivefold Dao realms or even sixth-fold Dao realms, and there were also sevenfold Dao realms.

However, he didn't sense the Eightfold Dao Realm.

The powerhouse of the Eightfold Dao Realm stayed in his residence, and the formation was shielded, and he couldn't sense it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to register and became the patrol envoy of the Winter Night Fortress.

The task of his position is very simple, that is, to inspect every once in a while, or to patrol frequently, all according to his own resources, but it is not possible to go to patrol if he wants to.

The Inspector is here to inspect the surrounding area, and if there is no Inspector to inspect, then there is no point in setting up this position.

Soon, Ye Tian officially became an inspector of the Winter Night Fortress.

There is no specific distinction between high and low patrol envoys, and they are all under the management of the domain master of the Winter Night Fortress.

Like Ye Tian, the leader above is the domain master of the Winter Night Fortress - Su Ya, a woman of the Eightfold Dao Realm, and not an ordinary Eightfold Dao Realm, but also a real genius, although he did not take the road of the strongest Dao, but he was once able to fight beyond the level.

Therefore, in terms of strength, Su Ya's strength is much stronger than that of the Taibai Sword Master, and she may be able to kill the Taibai Sword Master in seconds.

If there is no such powerhouse in the Winter Night Fortress, how can he resist the Supreme Dao Void Demon!

After coming to the Winter Night Fortress, Ye Tian knew how powerful the Winter Night Fortress was, and the Winter Night Fortress was only one of the fortresses in the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance, not a top fortress, so it was conceivable how powerful the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance was.

"Let's take it one step at a time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he received the equipment belonging to the Winter Night Fortress Patrol Envoy, mainly a special Supreme Treasure - Patrol Mirror, this weapon can be connected to the Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon of the Winter Night Fortress - the Everything Patrol Mirror, which can spy on the situation in extremely distant areas.

One by one, the patrol envoys enter the virtual domain with the patrol mirror, and the scope of the patrol mirror of all things can be expanded by dozens or even hundreds of times.

Once a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons break into this area, they will naturally be discovered.

After receiving a patrol mirror and a small amount of resources, Ye Tian set off to enter the Void Domain.

Of course, he also left a replica body to practice at the Winter Night Fortress.

......

Imaginary domain.

Ye Tian kept moving away from the Winter Night Fortress, shuttling through the silent void, and his surroundings seemed to be surrounded by endless darkness.

If it is a weak Supreme Dao Realm, in such an atmosphere, it will really be afraid.

After all, this area is really dangerous, and from time to time, there are Supreme Dao Void Demons who sneak into this area to hunt and kill patrol envoys.

The patrol mirror is not omnipotent, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon also has treasures that can temporarily shield the peep of the patrol mirror, so once you encounter such a Supreme Path Void Demon, it will be very unlucky.

Soon, Ye Tian was far away from the Winter Night Fortress.

Normal patrol envoys, when they come to this area, will not approach again, otherwise it will be extremely dangerous.

But Ye Tian continued to sneak in, and he soon went deeper into a more distant area.

Finally, the patrol mirror sensed some of the Void Demons.

"Kill these Supreme Dao Void Demons first!"

Ye Tian quickly shuttled, heading to the places where those Dao Void Demons were.

In a few moments, he came there.

"These Supreme Void Demons are actually mining!"

They must have discovered a vein and wanted to mine it.

However, these Supreme Dao Void Demons were not powerful, and the highest cultivator was only a sixth-level Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"These Supreme Dao Void Demons are too weak, even if they are killed, they won't be able to exchange them for any combat exploits!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He was ready to hide his strength to fight against this group of Supreme Void Demons, so as to attract more and more powerful Supreme Void Demons, and then wipe them out.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian appeared, and only revealed the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules, and fought with this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

Thundered!!!!!

The fluctuations of the battle were transmitted to a far away area, and this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons saw that Ye Tian's strength was not too strong, but they couldn't deal with it themselves, so they fled while fighting, and secretly asked for help.

One after another Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed by Ye Tian, and their corpses were put away by Ye Tian.

In the Winter Night Fortress, in exchange for battle merits, you have to use the corpse of the Dao Void Demon, after all, there is no battlefield array here, but there is no way to obtain battle merits in time, so you can only rely on this local method.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian had killed dozens of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

"Their plea for help should be coming soon!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Really.

Rumble!!!!

A Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon descended, and a total of six came.

These six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons directly surrounded Ye Tian.

"The patrol envoy of the Winter Night Fortress actually dared to come here, this guy has only comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao Realm with only five levels of Dao Realm, he is definitely a genius of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and killing him will definitely be exchanged for a lot of rewards. "

As he spoke, these six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons made a move.

"There are only six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, it's okay!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian's body was filled with the sixth sequence of Dao rules.

In an instant, heaven and earth were all blocked by Ye Tian's sixth sequence of supreme dao rules.

The dense Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules turned into countless silk threads, strangled these six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and then took away their corpses.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to continue to stay here, otherwise he would usher in that kind of invincible existence in the Eightfold Dao Realm, and he wouldn't even want to bring back the loot.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian came back, and then took out the Supreme Dao Void Demon he had killed in exchange for battle merits.

These Supreme Dao Void Demon corpses are also very valuable, and they can sacrifice heaven and earth when they get the Innate Origin Domain, and enhance the Origin of the Innate Origin Domain.

This is also the reason why the corpse of the Supreme Dao Void Demon can be exchanged for battle merits!

"It's only 60,000 combat merits!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

However, the battle merits of the fortress are different from the battlefield merits, the battle merits of the fortress are the merits of the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and they can be exchanged for rewards in any fortress, while the combat merits of a certain Innate Origin Battlefield can only be exchanged for materials in that battle merit.

Therefore, the battle exploits of the fortress are truly precious.

Sixty thousand battle merits may not seem like much, but many supreme Dao realm battles for many years have not been able to obtain so many battle merits.

Winter Night Fortress, Battle Glory Exchange.

Ye Tian conjured up the appearance of a purple stone and asked, "Can I exchange my battle exploits for this?"

"This is the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone, right? Do you really want to exchange your combat merits for this?" The Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm at the Battle Merit Exchange Office reminded: "Although the Purple Ruins Devouring Stone can help the Supreme Dao Realm comprehend the sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules, this thing will erode the origin, and only the cultivation above the Fifth Rank Dao Realm can be devoured, and if the cultivation is too low, it will kill you directly." In addition, if you devour too much, even if it is the Eightfold Dao Realm, the foundation will be completely destroyed, and there will be no hope of continuing to break through. "

"I know, just exchange this, there is a relative in the Innate Origin Domain where I am located who can't break through, so exchange it for him to try. Ye Tian said nonsense.

The person in charge of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm didn't care if what Ye Tian said was true or not, and continued: "Okay, the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone is different in value according to its size and quality, one piece of high-quality Purple Ruin Devouring Stone is one piece of Ten Thousand Battle Merits, and one piece of Ordinary Quality Purple Ruin Devouring Stone is one of one Thousand Battle Merit. "

"Exchange for high-quality Purple Ruin Stones!"

Ye Tian said.
